meaning: n.宽腰带(日本妇女和服用的)
examples: But for Nkiruka Obi - not his real name - it is a different story.
John Mikel Obi, in particular, gummed up the works as the holding midfielder.

Obi was ordered by Fifa's Dispute Resolution Chamber to return, after Lyn complained to Fifa.
